ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgement
Off Calendar Oct-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Andrew Dimitriou of Dimitriou & Associates PC (415.434.1144) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court hears from counsel for the moving party. The Court vacatess the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT DIMITRIOU & ASSOCIATES, PC's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgement is GRANTED. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-15-2016 Continued To Nov-01-16 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT DIMITRIOU & ASSOCIATES, PC'S Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment is Denied without prejudice to being re-filed. No memorandum or proof of service was filed.
Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR # 6576 =302/hk
